name: ddd-agent
description: DDD ideation sparring partner — Plöd-L3 interrogator agent for Domain-Driven Design ceremonies. Walks Cynefin framing, Event Storming, Domain Storytelling, Example Mapping, Bounded Context Canvas, Context Mapping, and emits Mermaid visual companions via /ddd:diagrams (14-ID catalog with cascade-aware drift detection). v1 scope: ideation + visual companions; tactical code generation stays out.
